batch_metadata.note: Oct drop (INF-005) batch — Melissa largely silent after Oct conflict. 148 messages over ~7 weeks reflects reduced contact. ROW-8679 (Dec 14, 2024) appears in the dataset's three-block sequential data out of chronological order (discovered in B-030 sequential block). Chronologically belongs to Dec 14 — the gap between B-020 (ends Dec 6) and B-021 (starts Dec 19). Assigned to B-020 as the closest pre-gap batch.

flagged_messages.primary_reasoning: Response-demand message with escalating contempt — demanding immediate response to a phone call. ADD-002 slur ('Bitch') combined with explicit demand for immediate contact compliance. Mechanism: Eli's non-response to a call triggers a contemptuous response-demand text, coercing communication. Per ADD-004: demanding immediate response ('why aren't you answering?' response-demand framing) qualifies as RF-07. Sev-1 assigned: single message, no flooding cluster, no confirmation of custodial-time context from available data (Dec 14 2024 is a Sunday — likely Eli's parenting time; weekend parenting schedule per ADD-004, but Dec 14 specific custody status not confirmed). Data structure note: ROW-8679 appears in the three-block sequential data out of chronological order (discovered in B-030 sequential block but dated Dec 14 2024). Assigned to this batch as closest pre-gap batch.
flagged_messages.calibration_notes: Sev-1 assigned (single response-demand message). Sev-2 would require confirmation of custodial-time context (Dec 14 is Sunday; likely Eli's parenting time but not confirmed from available data). ADD-001 flooding threshold not met — single message. ADD-004 response-demand framing confirmed.

arc_state_snapshot.note: ARC-RF07-001 ACTIVE. S-002 added (ROW-8679, Sev-1). Arc now has 2 signals total: S-001 (Aug 4-5 2024 mega-cluster, Sev-2) and S-002 (Dec 14 2024 response-demand, Sev-1). Sub-patterns now confirmed: flooding_candidate (S-001), response_demand_with_contempt (S-002). Oct behavioral silence (INF-005) context: Melissa's reduced contact Oct 19-Dec 6 makes ROW-8679 (Dec 14) notable as a sharp re-emergence of contemptuous demand behavior after the silence period.

batch_observations.tone_assessment: Low volume — Melissa's post-October behavioral silence (INF-005) dominates this batch. 148 messages over ~7 weeks is well below normal communication density. Cooperative necessity-only communication pattern during this period.
batch_observations.rf07_assessment: One primary signal: ROW-8679 (Sev-1, response-demand with contempt). This message marks re-emergence of contemptuous demand behavior after the Oct silence. Single message does not constitute flooding. Dec 14 Sunday timing raises ADD-004 custodial-time-overstepping question (unconfirmed). Arc second signal added.
batch_observations.custodial_context: Oct-Dec 2024 covers standard parenting-time weekends. Oct silence suggests Melissa was not overstepping during this period. Dec 14 (Sunday) is likely Eli's parenting time — if confirmed, ROW-8679 would be Sev-2 (ADD-004 response-demand during parenting time). Held at Sev-1 pending synthesis confirmation.
